programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank questions whether a run-in with community activists was an accident or a setup. Also, Jamie strives to rely less on Frank's input to makes decisions, Erin helps Anthony protect his daughter and ex-wife from a dangerous psychiatric patient.

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After an incident where Officer Witten's (Lauren Patten) backup physically could not keep up with a chase, Frank must decide whether to implement a more rigorous fitness test for the NYPD.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After someone breaks into Luis Delgado's (Lou Diamond Phillips) home and kills his wife, Luis and Danny team up to take down the vicious murderer who may also be responsible for Linda's death.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin must convince Frank to back a new state police bill as part of a bargain she made with Governor Mendez (David Zayas). Also, Danny and Baez pursue the same perp twice after the DA's office is unconvinced by their initial lineup.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: DNA evidence in a murder case leads Danny and Baez to identical twins with identical alibis. Also, Frank learns Nicky is interviewing for a job at the Justice Coalition, which he rarely sees eye-to-eye with.

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran tres cuerpos con marcas de mordeduras de animales y humanos en una tumba poco profunda cerca de Milwaukee, la UAC tiene preguntas desconcertantes que responder.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: A medida que el UAC concluye una investigación sobre apuñalamientos inusuales en el estado de Nueva York, la visita de Morgan a un sobreviviente podría descubrir más preguntas que quedan para que el equipo responda.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La incansable búsqueda de Gibbs y Fornell para encontrar al jefe de la red de narcotráfico responsable de la sobredosis de Emily, la hija de Fornell, por fin llega a su clímax.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Siguiendo un caso sobre contrabando de armas, Bishop y Torres se ven envueltos en un tiroteo en la residencia de un antiguo sheriff que ahora es un sitio histórico. Pero terminan encerrados en las celdas abandonadas de ese lugar.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: NCIS investiga la muerte de un oficial de la armada quien fue asesinado mientras conducía a la casa de un recluso puesto en libertad recientemente.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Tras el descubrimiento del nombre de Sloane en un autobús abandonado en Afganistán y con el conductor muerto, Gibbs la acompaña para ayudarle a encontrar a un grupo de mujeres que han sido secuestradas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Quien se aleja
programme.desc: Cuando la inmunidad diplomática complica un caso de abuso infantil para Danny y Baez, Frank interviene, a pesar de no tener jurisdicción en el caso.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Dentro y fuera
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un líder de pandilla, Danny y Baez descubren que el presunto asesino es un ex convicto que tiene una relación romántica con su oficial de libertad condicional, quien podría estar ayudando a encubrir el crimen.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Almas perdidas
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un conductor ebrio que mató a una madre y su hijo, Danny y Baez se debaten entre cumplir con su deber y buscar justicia al descubrir la conexión entre el sospechoso y la víctima.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Apuesta alta
programme.desc: Cuando el hermano de Linda, Jimmy (Kevin Dillon), se mete en problemas con la mafia, le suplica a Danny que lo ayude a mantenerse a salvo hasta que la situación se calme

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 4 años de edad, se pierde durante su estancia con un familiar en Mississippi, el UAC descubre algunas verdades sorprendentes como las carreras de equipo para encontrar a la niña y llevarla a un lugar seguro.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando unos cuerpos ahogados misteriosamente son descubiertos en el desierto de Las Vegas, el UAC trata de averiguar la verdadera causa y el motivo de los asesinatos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran tres cuerpos con marcas de mordeduras de animales y humanos en una tumba poco profunda cerca de Milwaukee, la UAC tiene preguntas desconcertantes que responder.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: A medida que el UAC concluye una investigación sobre apuñalamientos inusuales en el estado de Nueva York, la visita de Morgan a un sobreviviente podría descubrir más preguntas que quedan para que el equipo responda.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/1/2016. Anthony Bourdain visits the iconic Old Town Ale House, eats mapo tofu in Chinatown and shares a home-cooked meal with rapper Lupe Fiasco.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/8/2016. On the island of Naxos, Anthony Bourdain dives to a sunken shipwreck, drinks raki with locals and samples cuisine fresh off a fishing boat.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/15/2016. Anthony Bourdain visits the Crow Reservation, hunts with podcast host Joe Rogan and eats dinner at Butte institution Lydia’s Supper Club.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/14/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia: Myanmar, the city of Yangon and the remote Bagan temple.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/21/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Koreatown in Los Angeles, where he finds a tight-knit community marked by the 1992 Rodney King riots.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/28/2013. Colombia has changed immensely over the past 10 years. Anthony Bourdain explores several regions of the country, from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/05/2013. Chefs and restauranteurs Fred Morin and Dave McMillan, of Joe Beef’s, take us across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 4/24/2016. Anthony Bourdain explores the Philippines at Christmas and eats at beloved chicken chain Jollibee, samples sisig and indulges in the popular dessert halo-halo.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver foot bails from a still-rolling van and hides nearby. A teen on a dirt bike refuses to stop for Deputies. A man attempts to run from a traffic stop but gets hung up on a fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After crashing a car during a pursuit, the driver runs into a pho restaurant and is captured. A loitering suspect is spotted smoking a meth pipe. A drunk driver is pulled from a smoking wreck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspects in a white van throw a bike at police during a wild pursuit. A man runs from Deputies on a mini-bike. A mermaid commits traffic infractions and is caught with pills.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man arguing with his father over money fights with three Deputies after an unsuccessful Taser deployment. A motorcycle runs from cops in Fontana. A suspect in Alameda County rams a patrol vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A Deputy learns a new game from Spring Break coeds. Deputies respond to a shooting at the beach. A teenager is caught with alcohol. A woman tells Deputies she's being followed on the boardwalk.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An intoxicated teen is found passed out in the surf late at night. Deputies find trespassers in a hot tub. A floating wallet is returned. The Marine Unit rescues a family thrown from jet skis.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An underaged spring breaker is caught with a 'blackout rage gallon' and issued a ticket. A zero-tolerance policy of no alcohol or glass containers on the beach is enforced in Pinellas County.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter dancing tourists on the Vegas Strip. An uncooperative spring breaker finds herself in cuffs. Surfers and lifeguards rescue swimmers from a riptide. A beachgoer lies about his age.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A teen holding a beer walks up to a Deputy. A jet skier violates a no wake zone. Deputies cut a tangled bird free. A minor discards his can of alcohol and tells Deputies his mom will pay his citation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with a knife resists as a hotel clerk cheers on Officers. A man protests the legality of a stop but finally admits why he argued with Officers. A passenger becomes emotional when meth is found.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A domestic call turns chaotic when a male suspect resists and his girlfriend interferes with his arrest. A truck with detachable red and blue lights is located during a call of a police impersonator.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers use a police SUV and a taser to stop a fleeing man with a knife. A hit-and-run suspect crashes into a gas station. An unlicensed driver has warrants in Greene County, Missouri.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect leads Officers on a car chase before running from a K9. A PIT maneuver is used to end a stolen vehicle pursuit. A man claims he has crazy eyes when a Deputy suspects him of driving high.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man flees from Deputies with the hood up on a pickup truck. A suspect bails from a stolen truck and pretends he wasn't driving. A drunk driver is caught after a hit-and-run at a dance hall.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist gives up after leading Fontana Officers on a wild pursuit. A K9 is used to track a felony shoplifting suspect who fled a traffic stop. A Stop Stick is used to end a chase in Missouri.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen TV hangs out of a van during a slow-speed pursuit. A woman bites her boyfriend during an argument in Florida. A man claims he received a stolen car from a relative.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female driving a stolen car spins out and runs from Officers in Missouri. A burglary in progress leads Officers to a suspect breaking windows at a church. An altered tag is discovered to be stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gives Officers a fake name when he's stopped on a bike with no lights. Officers initiate a high-risk traffic stop on a reckless driver. A man is caught walking in traffic on the Vegas Strip.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A lengthy pursuit in Independence, MO goes off-road. Deputies chase a motorcyclist who claims he ran because he doesn't have a motorcycle endorsement. A man ingests fentanyl during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman rams a police car and begs Officers to take care of her dog. A man tells Officers he was just a passenger in a stolen Honda. A woman crashes her bicycle while trying to elude Officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is tased twice after a car chase. His passenger resists and is also tased. A driver refuses to exit his truck in Florida. A woman claims the pills in her purse belong to her sister.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a bike refuses to stop and tries to hide a drug-filled backpack. A motorcyclist's attempt to flee is foiled by a big rig blocking the road. Meth is found in a center console during a stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female shoplifter flees in a stolen box truck and crashes into a retaining wall. A green Honda runs in Wichita. A female passenger in Florida admits to hiding drugs and a pipe in her intimate area.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect makes a video call during a pursuit to apologize for relapsing. A burglar runs in circles in a vain attempt to elude Officers. A Sergeant finds a magnetic box full of meth and a hidden gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The driver of a car with a loud exhaust admits he panicked and ran. A woman caught riding a stolen moped claims she borrowed it. A man is caught with a tool for deactivating security tags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver speeds off when asked to step out of his truck. Deputies learn a man with a warrant for fentanyl is hiding in a backyard. A suspect steals a portable speaker after threatening an employee.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect with an ATF warrant runs from a traffic stop and gets tased. Drones help locate stolen motorcycles in Fort Wayne. A suspect leaves behind soggy footprints when he bails from a stolen car.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team delves into the world of professional golf when the body of a legendary player is discovered during a high-profile tournament.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The case of two high school students, one dead and one missing, lead the CSIs into the underbelly of streetcar racing and a tangled web of deadly competition.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Rascal Flatts takes center stage when a band member is electrocuted by his own guitar during a concert, the CSI team investigates if it was a case of foul play.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a young boy is found murdered, the CSI team uncovers evidence that may link his death to an old case that recently resurfaced.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine and Detective Vartann are thrown together in a hotel room for 24 hours as they stake out a duo making drugs in the room next door.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team investigates the brutal murder of a family, they trace the killer to the house next door, which might belong to the "Dr. Jekyll" serial killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When Hodges and Wendy take a group of high school CSI Explorer Scouts on a field trip, they embellish their role in solving cases and take their assignment a little bit too far.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a student is discovered murdered at Lindsey's school, the investigation takes a sharp turn when the CSIs uncover an unlikely connection between the boy's death and atrocities of the past.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A legendary comic from the good old days of Las Vegas is set to reunite with his partner on stage for one night only, until one half of the famous duo is found dead.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A mother thought to be grieving for the loss of her family three years ago becomes a suspect in a CSI investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team must investigate one of their own when Langston is accused by a former colleague of being part of the Dr. Jekyll murders, on part one of a two-part season finale.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI's lives are on the line as they close in on the elusive Dr. Jekyll, and more than one member of the team may not live to see his capture.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston fights for his life after being stabbed by psychopath Nate Haskell, while the other CSIs attend a funeral that turns deadly.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hysteria ensues when a shark attacks a woman in the pool at a Las Vegas casino "day club," and the CSIs must determine if the killer is human or shark.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer es encontrada muerta y su cabello arreglado al estilo de los años 70 y ropa vintage, el equipo de CSI descubre pistas que apuntan a un asesino con un fetiche por el cabello.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Russell pide consejo a una antigua colega sobre un caso relacionado con la muerte de la exnovia de un hombre. Elisabeth Shue se une al elenco como la nueva CSI Julie Finlay.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una casa es totalmente robada de sus cimientos, el equipo de CSI busca respuestas. Mientras tanto, la nueva CSI Julie Finlay muestra su habilidad en el análisis de sangre.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un apagón paraliza la ciudad, el equipo de CSI debe volver a los métodos de la vieja escuela para resolver el caso de un niño desaparecido.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado para resolver el caso de un estudiante asesinado recientemente de quien la foto de su muerte termina siendo tendencia en internet.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se llama al equipo de CSI para investigar un robo y homicidio en una boda con el tema de “Alicia en el país de las maravillas”, no tienen mucho con qué trabajar para hallar al asesino. (Estrella invitada Jaclyn Smith)

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: Easter Sunday of 1992, the body of missing woman Lisa Ziegert is found in a field. The investigation yields hundreds of leads but no true suspect. After more than two decades on ice, the case is revived.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: When a woman is found murdered in her mobile home, police make two shocking discoveries--her husband may not only have been the killer, but he may have also killed his first wife 31 years before.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: In Portland, Maine a housewife disappears. One year later her body is unearthed in the cellar. I.R. unravels this cold case investigation from the inside out. With the help of science, police are able to uncover a blueprint of the crime.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: A fire in January 2007 claims the life of WWII vet Bennie Angelo. A closer look at the crime scene reveals Bennie was dead before the fire, bumping an arson case up to homicide.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A mother is suspected in the murders of two of her daughters when her third daughter finally convinces police to reopen two cold cases.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A police investigator discovers a letter written 16 years earlier that provides clues to a woman's murder. And a firearms expert supplies the evidence that South Carolina authorities need to put a man on trial in 2002 for a murder committed in 1961.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A videotape made at an ATM machine helps police in Louisville, KY, to nab a man suspected of raping 13 women. And a DA investigator in Georgia helps crack a murder case that his father, a police chief, first worked on 30 years before.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.title: Cold Case Files

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.title: Cold Case Files

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates find themselves in front of the camera for a crash course in how to deal with the media. The judges from the open call are brought back to have their final say.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.desc: Only two weeks into training camp, it's time to start making cuts. While "veteran" cheerleaders model bikinis for their upcoming calendar shoot, anxious training camp "rookies" dance their hearts out to prove to Kelli and Judy that they deserve to stay.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Since Snake’s suspension from teaching, Emma’s life has been turned upside-down. He’s really in a funk, and the dark cloud over his head has fouled the air at home, where Emma finds herself caught in the no-man’s-land between her parents.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy finally gets the news he’s been waiting for – he’s been accepted into NYU! But he’s got other things on his mind. He is slowly discovering that he has other options when it comes to his real dream – walking again.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Anya’s first year running the Free The Children Freedom Fast to promote education and health in Africa. She has a lot to coordinate - which would be hard enough without meddling Holly J, who’s determined to make Anya choose between her and Sav.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s renewed relationship with Lucas is making her feel like she’s on top of the world. With the extra free time afforded by his help, she's taking on all the high school things her parenting has kept her from enjoying.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s world is rocked when Paige drops a bomb – her dad’s going to help her buy a condo. Ellie’s just learned she might be up for the editorship of the Core newspaper, so she’s distracted.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner and Jimmy have just one more exam before they’re finally done school and, with Jimmy's help, Spinner's sure he can pass and enjoy his cancer-free future.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With time ticking towards the Class of ’07 Prom and Graduation ceremony, Liberty has the perfect night planned: a hotel prom, with the amazing Natasha Bedingfield performing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Relieved of parental duty for the year by mom, Mia starts the school year off with a bang by bonding with new girl, Leia, and getting scouted to be the new face of football star Tom Blakes’ shoe line.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia does what she can to ensure her success. Besides, Tom is handsome and famous, so Mia thinks being with Tom to get ahead isn’t such a bad trade.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane wants to play football but since there is no girls team, then boys’ football it is. The Shep doesn’t like the idea one bit, but once Jane proves she’s faster, stronger, and more athletic than most of the team, he relents…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Eager to make the most of her college experience, Liberty jumps at the chance to rush the most popular sorority at Smithdale. Determined to get in, Liberty slowly exchanges old habits and old friends (Manny and Emma) for sorority approved ones.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter begins a relationship with Mia and a friendship with Riley. Finding a balance between a new girlfriend and a new guy friend gets confusing, especially when Riley is suddenly kissing Peter.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Sav and Anya plan to celebrate their six-month anniversary on the school’s overnight trip. Only problem? Alli, Sav’s sister, convinces their parents to let her go on the trip on the condition that Sav spends every second with her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s T-Bombz campaign is hitting the city and Degrassi. But Holly J has bigger and better things going on. She’s prepping the Power Squad for an out-of-town competition, and things are looking good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner and Jane have plans for next year – she’ll start pre-law and he’ll attend Police College. When he doesn’t get in, he can’t bear to tell her, so he lies.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Desperate to win Jane back, Spinner sneaks into the Leadership Convention Jane is speaking at and proposes. When Jane turns him down, Spinner breaks up with her – nothing he does is ever good enough.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s the star of Degrassi’s first-ever football game win! The Shep is floored at how much Riley’s improved.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare stands up for Connor when he receives unfair treatment from The Shep. The result of their peaceful protest? Detentions for everyone. No one is more frustrated by the detention than Alli. It wasn’t her idea to protest.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Pushed to the edge by Holly J, Alli begins posting nasty things about her on the “anti-Grapevine” blog, the underground school on-line site.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Shep has returned after his sensitivity training and it’s Spirit Week at Degrassi! However spirits are anything but high at home for Jane as she struggles to get her dropout brother Lucas off the couch.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane admits to herself that her issues with her dad go deeper than the divorce – she thinks maybe he did things to her. Jane is very confused and feels alone. Lucas gives Jane a hard time for creating tension between mom and dad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma’s tired of being referred to as Kelly’s girlfriend and Blonde Emma – she’s not even blonde anymore! Determined to create a distinct university identity, Emma borrows some pot that was gifted to Kelly and smokes up with Becca and Gwyneth.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli wants Johnny to like her, a lot. She worries she’s going to lose him to an older more “experienced” girl so to make sure she keeps her man close, Alli decides to play with the big kids at a ravine party.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Stress is at an all-time high at Degrassi with exams approaching and course selections due for next term.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Blue asks Holly J to the winter dance in a very romantic way. Only problem? Holly J thinks she might have a thing for her co-worker, Spinner. While Blue is a dreamboat, Spinner is a goofball.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kevin Smith and Jason Mewes are back! But this time, the Degrassi gang ventures to L.A. via school bus to score parts in Mewesical High, a fictional musical directed by Jason Mewes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kevin Smith and Jason Mewes are back! But this time, the Degrassi gang ventures to L.A. via school bus to score parts in Mewesical High, a fictional musical directed by Jason Mewes.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Archaeologist and historian Richard Miles examines the phenomenon of the Roman Republic, from its fratricidal mythical beginnings, with the legend of Romulus and Remus, to the all too real violence of its end.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: The material benefits of the `good order' delivered by Roman rule provided its citizens and subjects with the security to ask profound questions about the meaning of life, questions that the Roman belief system was ill-equipped to answer.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: A US law has been passed forcing the return of ethnic artefacts and ancestral remains to native communities.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Dinosaur
programme.desc: David Attenborough tells the story of the discovery and reconstruction in Argentina of the world's largest known dinosaur, a brand new species of titanosaur. Measuring 37m long, it now holds the record as the biggest animal ever to walk the earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: The earth split in India 66 million years ago in a disaster that may have caused the end of the dinosaurs.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the idea of human coexistence with dinosaurs. Had the species not disappeared from the face of earth ages ago, keeping them as pets could have been a possibility.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as diplodocus was the immense argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A new generation of carnivores was about to take killing to the next level. At the end of the Cretaceous period, these new hunter killers had spread throughout the globe.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: In 2000, scientists made a groundbreaking discovery, explaining how birds evolved from dinosaurs. However, a deeper investigation put a question mark over everything.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: With Harry and Sarah as his prisoners, Davros interrogates the Doctor, forcing him to reveal the future of the Daleks so that he can learn from their defeats to make them stronger.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks

programme.desc: The Doctor and Sarah try to warn UNIT of the Kraal invasion, but nobody believes them.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Doom
programme.desc: The Doctor and Sarah track down the remaining Krynoid pod to the estate of Harrison Chase. The millionaire botanist intends to use the pod to change a human victim into a Krynoid.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Doom

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Doom

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows very little about Peter, but what he does know, he doesn't like! Not only is he currently facing two counts of second degree sexual assault, about week ago, he dropped out of sight before missing his court date.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are finally getting married! They've been together for more than ten years, but Dog is determined, as he puts it, to "marry his common law wife the Christian way."

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team must deal with misleading informants, belligerent boaters, and angry drunks when they go after Kimberly, a traffic offender with over 20 violations. And if that isn't enough, Dog has another problem -- Duane Lee is sick.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket--Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis relinquishes control of Denver-Carrington and the mansion back to Blake; Ben battles Alexis for equal control of Colbyco; Michael Culhane and Alexis form an alliance against Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sammy Jo fears she will lose Clay if he learns about her false pregnancy; Adam discovers the identity of the mysterious woman tormenting Ben; An explosion rips through an oil rig, trapping Blake amidst raging flames, as Ben leaves him to die.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Ben returns to Blake's aid and pulls him to safety, both narrowly escaping the devastation of the ensuing explosion; Blake suffers memory loss due to the explosion; Alexis leads Blake to believe they have been married for the past twenty-three years.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sammy Jo informs Clay of her desire for an annulment to their marriage; Dominique is roughed up by thugs threatening her to cooperate with their boss, as Gary Tilden coincidentally returns to Denver.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle suspects Blake's once passionate feelings for Alexis may still be lingering; Blake and Ben reach a mutual reconciliation; Amanda disappears to London; Leslie Carrington finds Ben.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Clay reluctantly signs the annulment papers to end his and Sammy Jo's marriage; Blake persuades Leslie Carrington to stay in Denver and give Ben a second chance; Adam proposes to Dana.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystina lapses into unconsciousness, as doctors fight against time to bring her back; Krystle rebuffs Alexis' sincere concern for Krystina's health; Steven and Sammy Jo assume the appearance of a normal marriage for Danny's sake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystina is flown to California, awaiting a donor for her vital heart transplant; Leslie moves into the Carrington mansion; Blake and Krystle mount a media blitz to plea for a heart donor.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystina's only hope for life seems dashed, as the mother of the heart donor retracts her offer to allow the operation; Neil McVane carries out his promise of blackmail.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystina is welcomed home, following her so-far successful heart transplant; Alexis' affections are pursued by a wealthy real estate baron; convinced he is not a Carrington, Adam's life begins to crumble.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam continues to slip further away from Dana and his family, as doubts to his Carrington heritage have their effect; Alexis ends her relationship with Michael Culhane.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sarah makes a dress for Krystina identical to one worn by her own little girl; concerned over his irrational behavior, Blake hires a private investigator to follow Adam, as his self-destructive quest leads toward disaster.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven struggles with his love for Sammy Jo and his homosexuality; despite being warned of Dirk Maurier's questionable business practices, Alexis agrees to a partnership; Leslie and Clay's romance leads to passion.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle and Blake wait helplessly as the police search for Sarah and Krystina; Adam tips Neal McVane to a stock buyout by Alexis and Dirk Maurier; Nick Kimball celebrates his recent good fortune with a marriage proposal to Dominique.

programme.title: The Herd with Colin Cowherd
programme.desc: THE HERD WITH COLIN COWHERD is a three-hour sports television show hosted by Colin Cowherd and Jason McIntyre. Cowherd is a veteran broadcaster with over 20 years of experience in the sports television and radio field.

programme.title: First Things First
programme.desc: FIRST THINGS FIRST is a daily sports talk show hosted by Nick Wright, Chris Broussard and Kevin Wildes. Wright started his broadcasting career as a critically acclaimed radio host and is joined by longtime sports reporter and commentator Chris Broussard.

programme.title: Breakfast Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by Craig Carton, Mark Schlereth, and Danny Parkins, Breakfast Ball is a fun and lively morning show discussing the biggest sports stories of the day.

programme.title: The Facility
programme.desc: Hosted by Emmanuel Acho, LeSean McCoy, James Jones, and Chase Daniel, The Facility takes you inside the biggest sports topics from the athlete’s perspective.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this couples stunt, partners will hang by their ankles, they will each hold onto one end of a rope and be lifted over the water. Couples will use their mouths to root around in pies made from wax worms, pigs stomach, fish sauce and duck tongue.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Player A is placed on a dunk tank. In the tank is a mixture of cow parts floating in water. One member of the team will be suspended by their ankles underneath a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this stunt, the female contestant will be placed in a cage that is hung from a helicopter and is approx. 20 feet in the air. A dumpster filled with disgusting garbage is placed at one end of an alley.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be standing on a beam that is suspended high in the air. Player is placed in a coffin with 100 chicken feet and is then covered in rats. Couples stunt one of the team members is hog tied by four ropes and suspended.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Two contestants are seated in the front of a car. The driver is blind folded and the passenger must navigate for them. Player is strapped down in a coffin and then covered with 500 Tarantulas.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will exit a helicopter and release a flag. They will be standing on platforms suspended in the air. Contestant must chew through the cow intestine. Contestants will ride a mini motorcycle across a beam that is suspended from a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant must get on a pole directly out, under the nose of a helicopter. Players will bob in cheese and then eat grasshoppers. Contestants are hung upside down into a Plexiglas tank filled with Eels. Contestants must drive up with only two wheels.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant will be put in a clear plex-glass tube that will be lifted up and placed just above the water. Snakes and lizards will be dumped in the box. Contestant will be standing on a plexi-glass incline pirtched on top of a roof in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be standing in either end of two large cylinders, suspended in the air over water. Player must grab a mouth full of insects, then place into a meat grinder using their mouth. Inside the tanker truck, it would be filled with water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants are placed in a box with two plexi-glass walls that will be lifted off the ground. Contestants will be served live snails. Contestants are seated in a car that is in the back of a semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be dangling from a rope off the roof. Contestants will have to clear a bug splattered car windshield using only their mouth and face. The contestant will be standing on a beam suspended from a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will stand on top of a truck as it speeds trying to grab as many flags. Contestants will shoot potatoes at a target using a shoulder mounted air cannon. The contestant must start the car, there are tractors driving towards their car.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The parent and the child will have to cross a beam above the water releasing flags along the way. Cockroaches are being poured into the box while the child sits in a box without a top. In this family stunt the child will start by standing on the dock.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A contestant will be seated in the driver's seat of a limousine, the second contestant will be in the trunk. The contestant will be tied into their seat and to the steering wheel of a automobile.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Únete a Tony en su búsqueda del bar perfecto en Nueva York. Descubra la composición química correcta de las bebidas, las alegrías de los bares de mala muerte y la necesidad de aperitivos a altas horas de la noche.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Tony viaja a la capital del cinturón de cereales de Minneapolis, Minnesota, para experimentar de primera mano el conflicto entre los operadores creativos independientes y las franquicias genéricas.

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Nuestro chef, Kumar Paredes, inicia la búsqueda del primer pez desconocido en su barrio: el callao. Luego de visitar un mercado en el puerto de Lima, pesca un pez llamado picuda. ¿Pasará este pescado la prueba de frío, calor y fritura?

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Continúa la búsqueda de peces desconocidos y esta vez llegamos al tradicional barrio de Magdalena. Tras ver la oferta marítima del día, el chef Kumar Paredes decide probar el pez espada.

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Surquillo es reconocido por tener uno de los mercados más variados de Lima. El chef Kumar Paredes llega a este barrio en busca del pez desconocido del día: cachema.

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Kumar visita Lince para probar un pescado que mucha gente conoce, pero pocos lo usan. Estamos hablando del bonito. ¿Te atreves a ver que preparan?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: En el paraíso de St. Martin, Tony come una saludable comida rastafari con un luchador por la libertad, ayuda a preparar la comida, descubre la comida que no está disponible en los supermercados de Estados Unidos y se relaja en un bar de la playa.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: En New Orleans, Louisiana, Tony atrapa un caimán Bayou, se refresca con helado mundialmente famoso, tiene problemas con la ley, come jambalaya con un chef bailarín y se relaja con un poco de jazz local.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Conocida como la capital de la felicidad de Brasil, Salvador da Bahía ofrece una variedad de mercados. Aquí, Tony participa en una ceremonia tradicional local y experimenta los talentos culinarios del famoso artista de la cocina bahiana: el chef Dada.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: ¿Qué es un carioca? Los nativos son adorables bribones que encuentran formas de evitar el trabajo, prefiriendo la playa, coqueteando, frecuentando restaurantes y bares. Tony, bajo la tutela de un carioca ejemplar, prueba el estilo de vida.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Únete a Tony en su búsqueda del bar perfecto en Nueva York. Descubra la composición química correcta de las bebidas, las alegrías de los bares de mala muerte y la necesidad de aperitivos a altas horas de la noche.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman was found in his rental car. Teeth and bone fragments were the only remains. When the victim's wife files an insurance claim for $7 million, investigators seek the help of a renowned forensic anthropologist.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: When a pipe bomb rips through a rural home, police have no idea who is responsible. A 9-volt battery and the remnants of a mailing label ead investigators to the man who made the bomb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: No one in a quiet residential community saw anything unusual the day one of their neighbors was brutally attacked and murdered. Fingerprints found at the crime scene and surveillance video helped investigators to apprehend the presumed killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When investigators found Bruce Miller dead in the office of his junkyard business, the crime scene was almost pristine. But when a computer forensics expert examined computers owned by the victim's wife and her lover, he found all the evidence needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting leaves one man dead and another seriously wounded. Cell phone calls and shell casings point to a suspect, but authorities are unable to place him at the crime scene. A forensic geologist proves that dirt is anything but dumb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Rosemary Anderson is found dead on the side of the road, her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man: serial killer Eric Edgar Cooke.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of employees' jobs. Forensic investigators must determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of jobs. Forensic investigators had to determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error, or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was supposed to be a routine motorcade for the Queen of England. But on the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the Amtrak Railroad experienced the deadliest train crash in United States history when the Sunset Limited derailed while crossing Alabama's Big Bayou Canot bridge. 47 passengers and crew were killed; scores more were injured.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A fire erupts in Kings Cross Station in London, killing 31 people and injuring dozens more. Investigators pinpoint the cause of the fire, but it takes state-of-the-art technology and fluid dynamics experts to explain why it became a deadly inferno.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police investigate a discarded sleeping bag containing bloody sneakers and a purse, which eventually leads to the body of a young woman. A mark found on the victim's body enables police to track the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is killed while walking her dogs in the woods. Since she has no enemies and her husband has an alibi, police assume it's a hunting accident — until they find a strange letter, allegedly written by the woman before her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An Alaskan police officer finds a woman's body while on routine patrol of a public park. During the autopsy, the medical examiner preserves the portion of her rib cage which sustained the fatal wound.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a talented television news anchor is shot to death outside her home, it appears to be a crime of passion perpetrated by an obsessed fan.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators sift through the ashes of a fire which killed a 40-year-old woman. The fire appears to have been started by an unattended cigarette. On closer look, forensic scientists discover the cause was far more complicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For seven years, a trio of men robbed one bank after another. They always got away before the police arrived and they left no evidence behind. But the way they stood and the clothes they wore told a story that could be read by forensic scientists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman suddenly becomes critically ill, eventually leaving her unable to walk. A bone marrow test reveals the cause: arsenic poisoning. Investigators must determine if the poisoning was caused by groundwater contamination or something sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Residents of Noel, Missouri were stunned to learn that their bank had been robbed and the bank president was missing. His body was later found floating in a lake, securely bound to a chair with duct tape.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young couple decided to celebrate their first wedding anniversary with a camping trip to Mount Hood. During the trip, the husband was shot and killed. Later, his wife told two different versions of the events which led to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman falls to her death from a cliff overlooking the ocean. Initially, investigators think it was a tragic accident. But after a forensic examination, police uncover a very different picture of what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Haunted by the disappearance of her mother, a young woman undertakes an investigation of her own. In her mother's diary, she discovers a dark family secret that might explain the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: California police had several suspects in the robbery and brutal murder of an elderly couple. Ten years later, a determined forensic scientist used material from a dentist's office to uncover ballistic evidence that had been overlooked.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 19-year-old woman was found dead in her car; the scene had been staged to make murder appear to be suicide. During their investigation, police discovered the victim was involved in a love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kimberly and Trini look after a mischievous little girl named Maria.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita sends her monster Eye Guy to kidnap Billy's bright young protégé.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Trini's favorite doll is brought to life by Rita Repulsa and commanded to capture the Rangers inside bottles.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Zack worries that his friends have forgotten his birthday, while Rita sends him an unwelcome present.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The gang fights Rita's minions at a carnival in order to save Trini's cousin.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: On their return from Hollywood, Lucy has her hands full with Ricky when he is hailed as a major celebrity. The Ricardos' neighbors join for a grand homecoming celebration and block party in Ricky's honor when the Ricardos and Mertze return together.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Ricardo's new fame leads to an invitation to appear on a television interview program. The live interview is to take place in their home and Ricky's new agent wants them to move to a more posh apartment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky cannot help Fred out by performing at his lodge show because he is already booked for a radio show that day. Lucy volunteers to help out so she and Fred whip up a Western act. Ricky discovers it's a rodeo show that he's booked for, not a radio show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky finds Lucy exhausted after a trying day with little Ricky and insists it is time their son started nursery school. Lucy's protests are overridden and Ricky takes young Ricky to nursery school, but the baby comes down with tonsillitis.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is offered a European booking that is too important to refuse but he can't afford to take Lucy with him. Lucy is furious at the prospect of being left behind, and when Ricky wants to take Fred Mertz along as the tour manager, Ethel too, is incensed.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy anticipates a 2nd honeymoon with Ricky on their boat trip to Europe, but Ricky's band duties keep him too busy. Lucy happily looks forward to romantic evenings and daytime deck games on board the ship as the Ricardos and the Mertzes sail for Europe.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes prepare to leave London for Paris, Lucy realizes that they will not have time to visit her ancestral land of Scotland. She was looking forward to seeking out members of the McGillicuddy clan, her distant relatives.

programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.desc: El Abuelo, con la ayuda de Gaspar, hace una lista de todas las cosas que quiere hacer antes de morir. Peluzin y el Noruego están adictos a un videojuego.

programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.desc: Karlie and her daughter collide with Pooh and her daughter at Rasheeda's event. Joc digs himself a deeper hole with Kendra. Scrappy struggles after a disastrous family get-together. Tokyo opens up to her mom about her personal struggles.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Mimi and Faith get caught up in Stevie and Ty's beef. Joc plots a happy ending with Kendra. Scrappy comes to terms with his car accident. Pooh and Sierra collide at Spice and Akbar's session. Karlie arrives at a crossroads on her fertility journey.

programme.title: Bobbit It Off!
programme.desc: Kirk and Rasheeda's 20th anniversary party goes left when Alexis Skyy comes for Karlie. Sierra fights for her freedom. Joc is horrified when Kendra asks him to get snipped. Momma Dee is in a health crisis. Karlie has been keeping a shocking secret.

programme.title: No Witness, No Protection
programme.desc: There's trouble in paradise for besties Sierra and Karlie. Up and coming rap superstar LightSkinKeisha is on the scene with her man by her side. Karlie and Alexis bond over a shared enemy and Scrappy continues to fear for Momma Dee's life.

programme.title: Secrets of Wild Australia
programme.desc: Australia's native crocodiles.

programme.title: Wild Wild Bunch
programme.desc: Analyze the shady methods that animal delinquents use to create fear and chaos.

programme.title: World's Deadliest
programme.desc: Predators do not always get their way, and the tables can be turned on mighty hunters when the underdog fights back.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: A glacial stroll alongside a Galápagos tortoise; dancing with venomous European adders; a battle between Lacerta lizards; leopard seals' stealth attacks.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Chatty capuchin monkeys; Eurasian river otters' chilling screams; fruit bats' loud complaints; orcas' human-scale speech systems.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Sea lions throw their weight around to win a mate, Cape buffalo deliver knockout punches, Canada geese hit hard with their wings, and lionesses rule the Savanna with an iron paw.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Warthogs' lumpy armor, giant African bullfrogs' jumping and biting skills, wild turkeys' sharp beaks and razorlike spurs, and Nile crocodiles' powerful jaws.

programme.title: Wolf vs Bear
programme.desc: Travel to Finland's vast forests in the spring, when brown bears awakening from hibernation and gray wolves with hungry pups must share a food source. Witness an epic battle of speed, agility, and wit versus size, strength, and impatience.

programme.title: Shark Squad
programme.desc: Sharks often get portrayed as mindless predators prone to attacking humans, but there is more to these graceful apex predators than meets the eye; the Bimini Sharklab undertakes novel research into shark intelligence.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Elands lock corkscrew horns; storks rattle sabre-shaped beaks; rhinos scare the competition with massive horns; striped marlins spear unsuspecting prey.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Madagascar is home to strange animals not found anywhere else on Earth; when these animals fight for supremacy, their battles are just as strange, from weird neck-wrestling weevils to ring tailed lemur moms that go into battle with baby on board.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Australia is home to an eclectic array of creatures, and the ways to succeed as an alpha are just as diverse; the beach turns into a dueling ground and the outback becomes a boxing ring, as animals face off with their own kind.

programme.title: World's Deadliest
programme.desc: Living in paradise is no holiday for many animals as it is hunting grounds for some terrifying and deadly creatures.

programme.title: World's Deadliest
programme.desc: Baby predators learn to hunt and some emerge from the womb ready to kill.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: The African savanna is an epic landscape, and whether it's head-bashing hippos, hormone-crazed elephants or dueling lions, battles that rage on the savanna are just as epic.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Welcome to India - a land of exotic animals and exotic warfare; monkeys stage dusty dust-ups, blackbucks wage open war on the open plains, and peacock dandies swing switchblades: these are colorful battles worthy of a vibrant land.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Steering clear of alphas, whose horns, claws and other protective gear keep them ready for battle, no matter what the weather dishes out; examining killer Highland cow horns, plucky mallard bills, razor-edged wolverine claws, and more.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: A male brown hare throws punches at his beloved; admiring a sandhill crane dance battle; ibexes butt heads (literally) during mating season; why leopards are stealth masters.

programme.title: Bears the Ultimate Survivors

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Casino Paradise is an artificial island owned and operated by Domino, a casino tycoon. Domino decides to run for President and brags that with $500 million to spend, the only way he can lose is if Lupin steals his campaign funds!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Political fixer Pomade Jaws trusts no one, not even his wife Laura. He's stored the scandalous secrets of various world leaders inside a voice-activated safe.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen and Goemon have turned themselves in to the FBI, but it's all part of the plan. Their real goal is to break out old man Clyde Barlow, who was once known as a genius bank robber, to get his help with their heist of the National Super Bank.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Isamu Kondo III, grandson of the leader of the Shinsengumi, hires Lupin and his gang to recover a golden cannon sunk by the Shogunate forces in the Tsugaru Strait. After much effort, the valuable golden cannon is finally recovered from the deep ocean.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Ellery Queen, the owner of the legendary sapphire called "The Eye of Solomon," is also the owner of a football team. Lupin, coming for the sapphire as announced, discovers Queen on the brink of death.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The 3rd Thieves Olympic is about to be held in Japan, and Lupin and Jigen are in it to win it! After winning the first and second Thieves Olympic, if they also win this year's getaway race, they'll become the first-ever Triple-Crown winners!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The world's largest diamond has been discovered in South Africa and Lupin has his eyes on the prize. But as it turns out, stealing it is the easy part!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko decides to marry Huffner for his jewelry collection, disregarding the rumor that Huffner's brides always die a mysterious death within a few weeks of their wedding. Turns out, he's also a collector of brides and likes them permanently preserved!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen receives a letter from Sister Angelica and heads to the African country of Borodias. Sister Angelica wants Jigen's help to rescue Dr. Othello, the leader of the country's independence movement.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The ICPO tries a different approach to capturing Lupin: Astrology. It enlists the help of Marianne, a clairvoyant who can read Lupin's actions using astrological predictions and her crystal ball.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko calls Lupin from Professor Pot's lab, but since Lupin is half-asleep, Jigen takes the call instead. Fujiko claims Professor Pot has accidentally invented a robot that manufactures diamonds, but Jigen doesn't believe a word she says and hangs up.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko has invited Lupin and company to a classical concert conducted by Kyoransky from the International Philharmonic. After they get a good look at Kyoransky's baton, studded with a a diamond worth at least 200 million yen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin goes to prison intent on making Silver tell what he did with the loot, only to discover that a new top-of-the-line prison was built over the site where he hid the money. Will the operation to trade an execution for the recovery of the money succeed?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the Golden Bell, symbol of the monarchy of Beltenberg and precious tourist attraction. However, the bell that sparkles in the belfry is just a brass replica.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata is taken hostage from ICPO headquarters. The terrorists demand to swap him with their boss Napoleon XI, but ICPO refuses. Since Zenigata is no further use to them, the terrorists are bound to kill him; but Lupin is to the rescue?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Smith Gang hit-man company was once the best in the business, but they're suffering now from tough competition. Though the company chairman Smith considers running TV ads to revive his business, he can't think of a good way to do it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Though Joe Spade was once a formidable hitman of renown and Jigen's sharpshooter coach, he now comes to beg for Jigen's help; he had gotten old, flubbed a hit contract, and is now on the run.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: ICPO Bureau Chief Jasmine is an able commissioner. She uses the governor to spur Zenigata into action, as she has a secret plan to arrest Lupin. But Jasmine's plan is to make this mission her very last at ICPO so she could get married.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Nightlight Mask murdered the Duke of Le Mond and stole his diamonds. ICPO is having trouble solving the case, so they induct mystery author Conan Dorill as a special inspector. Dorill deduces that the true identity of Nightlight Mask is Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On a night of thunder and rain, a man gives Lupin a doll. The next day there is a news report that a diamond called the Phoenix's Tear had been stolen. Lupin's been caught on security cameras, but he has no recollection of having done the deed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin's target is the Vatican Crown, located at the North Pole. He devises a plan to thwart pesky Fujiko, which is to relocate penguins at the South Pole to the North Pole.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The World Crime Prevention Devices Association has developed the "killer safe" that sent many safe crackers to their graves. But Lupin takes the challenge to steal what it guards.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin crashes crime boss Markane's masquerade party, but the party was just a ruse to entrap Lupin. Lupin gets hung by rope in the dark and is made the target of Markane's murder game in ten rounds, of which players have to hit the target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin gets called out to New York where he rescues a girl hunted by an organization called Red Spider. Lupin does everything he can to help the poor girl suffering from amnesia; he tries hypnosis on her but to no avail, he gets hypnotized instead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Old man Piccolo had taught Lupin the art of thievery 15 years ago. Learning that his widowed wife had all of her belongings impounded by the police, Lupin promises her to get them all back.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew sneak into Peking's Imperial Palace Museum to steal Emperor Shi's jade Mahjong set, but winds up getting chased by a gang.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Look who is flying above New York; it's Superman! All he does is fly around, but the town is in a panic because of his performance. In the meantime, a lot of banks get robbed.

programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex y quiere recuperar a su antigua pareja, pero la cita cambia los planes. Una pareja termina antes sus vacaciones y Spencer se abre con Norma. Rocío hace una visita exprés a la Master Suite. Hay una ceremonia de compromiso.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Entra de sorpresa el último ex y todos quedan en shock. La fiesta de compromiso cierra con broche de oro en la Master Suite. Unos videos le abren los ojos a varios y, en la fiesta final, recuerdan los mejores momentos de las vacaciones.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Shots con sentimiento

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: El jaque mate

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Karime y Elettra arman un plan para ligarse a Ferre y a Isaac delante de Adela y Eva porque no les gusta su actitud irrespetuosa, estas dos están un poco sorprendidas por lo que pasa y no saben bien como enfrentarlo.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Las vacaciones van a tope para todos menos para Eva que parece no disfrutar lo que está viviendo, ni la llegada de su amigo Pietro logra sacarle el mood negativo a la francesa de fuego. Al mismo tiempo la casa está en shock por un chisme.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los shore llegan a Roma. Hay discusiones por ver quién se queda con quién en el hotel. Potro está molesto porque Karime y Elettra se quedan con Víctor y se roban el cuarto del amor. Toda la belleza romana invadida porn los shores que cantan.

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Heavy fog leads to a close encounter of the culinary kind when Nico fishes a marine out of the drink. The aspiring chef is concerned about the quality of his curry, and Sanji is just the guy to refine his recipe!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A break in the rain provides the perfect opportunity for Usopp to help a young girl fulfill her dream of launching the world’s largest firework.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Money troubles force Zoro to tangle with Dick the Bandit and his treacherous gang of thugs. These gun-toting outlaws are terrorizing a peaceful village, and the Straw Hat swordsman aims to stop their reign of terror!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A barrage of Marine cannon balls forces the Straw Hats to seek refuge on an uncharted island. Once ashore, the crew encounters a strange old man living amongst a herd of goats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Old man Zenny made a fortune lending money to scallywags, but he always dreamed of becoming a pirate himself. When the marines set out to trap the Straw Hats, the wily hermit may finally get his wish!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zenny gets more than he bargained for when he embarks on his maiden pirate voyage. The Straw Hats may have made a friend for life, but what are they gonna do about those pesky marines?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats stop for supplies at a harbor town plagued by a mayor who taxes anything and everything. Over lunch, Luffy and Nico befriend a kooky scientist who’s obsessed with the Rainbow Mist.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Usopp, Nico, and Zoro get trapped in the Rainbow Mist along with Henzo. The aging scientist is looking for answers, the Straw Hats want treasure, and the ghosts who haunt the mist want them all to leave!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew search for a way out of Ape’s Concert, but the Rainbow Mist is an inescapable maze of madness. Back on shore, Nami, Chopper, and Sanji face a lifetime of hard labor for failing to pay their taxes!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami enters the mist on a mission to save her mates – and maybe hunt for treasure while she’s at it. The local mayor wants her dead, but the Straw Hats are being protected by a mysterious marine.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Still searching for a route to the island in the sky, the Straw Hats chart a course for Jaya. Meanwhile, Fire-Fist Ace crashes a party aboard a vessel helmed by Buggy the Pirate!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.desc: Luffy and his mates reach the home of Mont Blanc Cricket: the man with the key to reaching Sky Island. There’s just one tiny problem – he comes from a long line of legendary liars.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.title: Simply Ming

programme.title: Simply Ming

programme.title: Crimes That Made History

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: In 1929, seven members of Bugs Moran’s gang are assassinated in a garage by Al Capone’s henchmen.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: In August 1933, Violette Nozière, 18, killed her father by poisoning in Paris. After a short period on the run, she was charged with murder and swiftly confessed to the crime, saying her motive was that he abused her.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: On May 18th, 1936, Abe Sada killed her lover by “erotic asphyxia” then cut off his member and carved his name in her flesh. In a militarized Japan, the press was very interested in this crime with erotic and transgressive accents.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: On 8 July 1947, the US Air Force announced the discovery of a “flying disc” which had crashed in the Roswell area of New Mexico. This was the birth of the flying saucer phenomenon.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: On October 1972, an Uruguayan plane crashed into the Andes. 72 days later, 16 survivors are found! The incredible rescue fascinated the media across the world. How did they survive? An unspeakable truth gradually emerges: to survive.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: 1978 Guyana: Reverend Jim Jones holds an apocalyptic mass. Its outcome was the sacrifice of 918 members of the Peoples Temple – an American cult founded in the middle of the 1950s. The entire world was horrified by the journalists’ accounts.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: On 31 August 1997, Princess Diana died alongside her companion, Dodi Al-Fayed, in a car crash in Paris, whilst being pursued by paparazzi. Her untimely death prompted an outpouring of grief in Britain and elsewhere in the world.

programme.title: Dates That Made History
programme.desc: Alexander’s death marks the loss of the greatest conquerors in History, the only man who managed to extend the Empire to Eurasia, the Mediterranean, and India. Different versions of The Romance of Alexander were found in the Persian, Arabian and Latin.

programme.title: Dates That Made History
programme.desc: Being a Christian is to believe that God is a man who came to Earth to deliver us from our sins, preaching and performed miracles, that he died on the cross and was resurrected.

programme.title: Dates That Made History
programme.desc: The catastrophe led to a vast interdisciplinary project. Volcanology reveals the force of the eruption, archeology and the study of texts uncover new objects of daily life found in the remains of buildings and roadways, including graffiti on the walls…

programme.title: Dates That Made History

programme.title: Dates That Made History
programme.desc: Did the first outbreaks occur in China or in the Caspian Sea? Experts still argue. But how did the plague actually spread? After many controversies, it seems that the rat flea was the major carrier of this disease.

programme.title: Dates That Made History
programme.desc: The fascinating discovery of Angkor’s ruins conveys images of magnificence and splendor. We’d like to believe in the idea of a lost civilization, as was the case for the Roman Empire.
